name: tradingview-mcp
description: Advanced multi-agent AI trading framework and real-time market analysis MCP server

tools.name: top_gainers
tools.description: Return the top gainers for an exchange and timeframe.

tools.name: top_losers
tools.description: Return the top losers for an exchange and timeframe.

tools.name: bollinger_scan
tools.description: Scan for assets with low Bollinger Band Width squeeze conditions.

tools.name: rating_filter
tools.description: Filter assets by Bollinger Band rating from -3 to +3.

tools.name: coin_analysis
tools.description: Get a detailed technical analysis for a specific symbol.

tools.name: consecutive_candles_scan
tools.description: Scan for bullish or bearish consecutive candle patterns.

tools.name: advanced_candle_pattern
tools.description: Analyze progressive candle-size patterns across multiple timeframes.

tools.name: volume_breakout_scanner
tools.description: Detect price moves confirmed by abnormal volume breakouts.

tools.name: volume_confirmation_analysis
tools.description: Run detailed volume confirmation analysis for one symbol.

tools.name: smart_volume_scanner
tools.description: Combine volume, price action, and RSI filters into a scanner.

tools.name: multi_agent_analysis
tools.description: Run the multi-agent technical, sentiment, and risk debate for one symbol.
